target.title: fix(agent): surface non_deliverable_terminal_turn with specific message instead of generic /new fallback
target.body:
## Summary  Fixes #94176 — When a model turn ends with `terminalError=non_deliverable_terminal_turn`, the user now sees actionable guidance instead of the misleading generic `/new` fallback.  ## Problem  Before this fix, when the model stopped between tool calls without producing a reply: - User saw: "⚠️ Something went wrong while processing your request. Please try again, or use /new to start a fresh session." - `/new` is the wrong remediation — it clears context unnecessarily when a simple retry would succeed - No diagnostic signal reached the user about what actually happened  ## Root Cause  `terminalError` from `resolveAttemptTrajectoryTerminal()` was recorded in trajectory events but NOT included in `runResult.meta`, so the reply system never saw it. The empty `terminalErrorMessage` caused the lifecycle to emit `end` instead of `error`, and downstream the generic fallback was used.  ## Fix (5 files, +28 lines)  | File | Change | |------|--------| | `agent-runner-failure-copy.ts` | Add `NON_DELIVERABLE_TERMINAL_TURN_FAILURE_TEXT` | | `agent-lifecycle-terminal.ts` | Add `terminalError` to deferred metadata keys | | `attempt.ts` | Surface `terminalError` + `terminalStatus` in runResult | | `agent-runner-execution.ts` | Check terminalError in terminalErrorMessage + buildExternalRunFailureReply | | `followup-runner.ts` | Same terminalError check |  The new user-facing message: > ⚠️ The model stopped between tool calls without producing a reply. Please try the same message again — this usually resolves on retry. If it persists, use /new or a lighter model. 
## Real behavior proof

Behavior or issue addressed:
A completed embedded agent turn with `terminalError=non_deliverable_terminal_turn` should surface the specific retry guidance instead of the generic external-run `/new` fallback.

Real environment tested:
Windows local checkout `C:\tmp\openclaw-94187` at rebased head `87351bedd45f8bfec3d9004415c380e1ea4630cb`, using the OpenClaw source harness with mocked embedded-run metadata for the terminal-error path. Mantis Telegram Desktop proof also ran on GitHub Actions run `27702473042`, but it did not produce a Telegram bot reply in either checkout, so it did not generate visible Telegram after-fix evidence.

Exact steps or command run after this patch:
1. `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-execution.test.ts --reporter=dot`
2. `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.plugin-sdk.config.ts --reporter=verbose`
3. `pnpm exec oxfmt --check src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/types.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/types.ts src/auto-reply/reply/agent-lifecycle-terminal.ts src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-execution.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-execution.ts src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-failure-copy.ts src/auto-reply/reply/followup-runner.ts`
4. `pnpm exec oxlint src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/types.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/types.ts src/auto-reply/reply/agent-lifecycle-terminal.ts src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-execution.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-execution.ts src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-failure-copy.ts src/auto-reply/reply/followup-runner.ts`
5. `git diff --check upstream/main..HEAD`
6. `pnpm tsgo:core`
7. `git verify-commit HEAD` and `git verify-commit HEAD~1`

Evidence after fix:
The focused source harness passed with `205 passed (205)` and covers a Telegram/direct-style run result whose metadata contains `terminalError: "non_deliverable_terminal_turn"`; the asserted reply payload is `⚠️ The model stopped between tool calls without producing a reply. Please try the same message again — this usually resolves on retry. If it persists, use /new or a lighter model.` The full plugin-sdk shard passed with `58 passed (58)` and `385 passed (385)`, confirming the rebased branch also clears the prior `checks-node-agentic-plugin-sdk` failure locally. Formatting, lint, diff whitespace, `tsgo:core`, and commit signature checks passed. Mantis artifact `mantis-evidence.json` from run `27702473042` says: `Mantis could not capture Telegram Desktop proof because the proof message did not produce a Telegram bot reply in either checkout.`

Observed result after fix:
In the source harness, the terminal-error metadata is propagated through embedded run metadata and the user-facing reply uses the specific retry guidance rather than the generic `/new` fallback. The branch is rebased on upstream `main` and pushed at `87351bedd45f8bfec3d9004415c380e1ea4630cb`.

What was not tested:
Live Telegram Desktop after-fix visibility is still not proven. The Mantis proof attempt did not produce a bot reply, so it cannot satisfy the ClawSweeper-requested real Telegram transcript/recording requirement.
target.author: lsr911
